name: Slash
description: A swift slash that deals moderate damage to the target.

name: Shield Wall
description: Raise a sturdy shield, gaining armor for this turn.

name: Poison Dart
description: Launch a poisoned dart that deals damage and applies a lingering debuff.

name: Healing Light
description: Channel warm light to restore health over time.

name: Fireball
description: Hurl a searing ball of fire dealing heavy damage to all enemies.

name: Frost Nova
description: Unleash a burst of ice that freezes nearby foes in place.

name: Shadow Strike
description: Vanish into shadow and strike from behind, dealing devastating critical damage.

name: Divine Wrath
description: Call down a pillar of holy fire from the heavens, annihilating everything in its path.
